        🎪

        Welcome to Fliporium

        Paste the invite key your friend sent you. It looks like hskey-auth-…

        Don't have a key yet? Ask whoever invited you — they generate it from their own Fliporium (Backstage → Invite a friend). You only need this once; after this launch, your device remembers itself.

        🎪

        Welcome to Fliporium

        A small private place for you and the people you care about.

        Backstage

        You

        Theme

        Sounds

        Twin Mode

        Pair another of your devices to keep 1:1 chat history in sync.

        Invite a friend

        Generate a QR code containing your Headscale server URL + a pre-auth key. Friend scans, joins your tailnet.

        Preview the text 
        
            
        
        
        
    
        
    
        
        
        Help
        
        
    
        
    
        
        
        Danger zone
        
        
        Permanently wipe this device's chat history, identity, caught files, and settings. Other peers' copies are untouched. No undo.
